## Type of change

<!-- Tick the one that applies. -->

- [ ] New case study under `examples/`
- [ ] Methodology revision (`docs/methodology.md`)
- [ ] Template revision (`templates/`)
- [ ] README or other documentation

## For case studies only

- [ ] Follows the eight-section structure in `templates/antemortem-template.md`
- [ ] Every trap classification cites **file + line** in the code under recon (primary-source)
- [ ] Post-implementation note included, or explicitly marked as not-yet-implemented
- [ ] Recon model and approximate time documented

## For methodology revisions

- [ ] Rationale explained in this PR description
- [ ] No contradiction with existing protocol steps unless this PR explicitly revises them
- [ ] If adding a new failure mode or "when NOT to antemortem" entry, grounded in a concrete example

## Summary

<!-- One paragraph. What does this change add / fix / revise and why. -->
